UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2002 ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: YVONNE LEE.

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day for a name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Plaintiff did not notice the father who lives in China. Matter taken off calendar. Court suggests to the petitioner to file an Amended OSC with proper notice to the minor's father.
